title: Robo Line Follower Race
summary: High speed robotic line follower race on an advanced obstacle track.
description: The Robo Line Follower Race is a highly competitive event where students test their speed and control algorithms. Participants race their line followers on complex tracks featuring curves, intersections, and dynamic obstacles.

title: Robo Line Follower Workshop
summary: Hands-on session on building and programming a line follower robot from scratch.
description: This workshop introduces students to the fundamentals of robotics, covering sensor integration, microcontrollers and PID control algorithms. Participants learned how to build and write firmware for their own autonomous line following robots.
